title: Qbiotix SARS-CoV-2 protocol
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"93tgb","text":"Qbiotix has developed novel nucleic acid assays and sample preparation procedures to improve global microbial detection standards and rapidly/inexpensively test high volume of samples. Qbiotix aims to enable countries to test their entire populations, their food, their waters with millions of tests per day on a regular basis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"76vc1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1lj2j","text":"The assays are isothermal and homogeneous. Thermocycling is not required and amplification is non-enzymatic removing the need for complex instrumentation and reliance on variable quality enzymes. Critically we have removed the need for complex nucleic acid preparation, integrated the assay into the collection/transport solution and significantly reduced reliance on a complex supply chain. The assays remove a good proportion of the constraints of PCR which heretofore have inhibited the number of people being testing for SARS-CoV-2 in the US and globally. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"181d0","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"e96f6","text":"The test should be run in a standard laboratory","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cm6o6","text":"Need to have kits and saliva collection devices provided by Qbiotix. Also need to have calibrated pipettes, tips, a magnetic separator and a microtiter plate analyzer. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 1- collect saliva vial 1 mL in a collection deviprovided by Qbiotix
2- open vial and scan barcode in a temperature laboratory with temperature between 18 and 25 degrees Celsius.
3- dispense 250 µL sample to single well in plate with a standard pipette

4- dispense 250 µL of magnetic bead solution in well with a standard pipette in a temperature controlled room with temperature between 18 and 25 degrees Celsius. The bead solution is supplied within a KIT provided by Qbiotix
5- incubate at controlled temperature on the plate reader 00:10:00
6- place plate on a magnetic separator 00:00:30
7- insert plate on analyzer (reading speed depends on chosen plate reader instrument). The plate reader analyzer needs to have with the ability to read fluorescence and control temperature
creator: vito
